repos.rationale: Primary target for all three deliverables: README.md, GitHub Actions publish workflow, and artifact retrieval commands. Also needs version string fix (src/index.ts line 47 hardcodes 0.1.0 vs package.json 1.2.0) and prepublishOnly script addition. New src/artifacts/ command module follows established patterns from src/comments/ and src/inspect/.

Requires a small but critical change: move two artifact route registrations in src/routes/api.ts (lines 261, 274) before the requireAuth gate (line 236) and add attachInspectionAuth + requireCommentAuth middleware. This follows the established comment-endpoint pattern and enables CLI access with hxi_ API keys. No handler, service, or schema changes needed.
